channel.title: Open Source on
channel.description: Recent content in Open Source on

item.title: k9s
item.description: A powerful terminal UI for Kubernetes that makes managing clusters feel fast, intuitive, and actually enjoyable.

item.title: n8n
item.description: The best visual workflow automation editor that connects to almost everything.

item.title: sqlmap
item.description: Automatic SQL injection and database takeover tool.

item.title: PostgREST
item.description: Automagically generate a production-ready REST APIs from any PostgreSQL database.
